queue.title: Test Automation Engineer with Security Clearance
queue.description: Mission Focus: NT Concepts is seeking a Test Automation Engineer to support the DoD enterprise Military Housing system. This complex system of 34 web-based modules is used by over 10,000 active users to meet the housing needs of over 2.5 million service members, DoD civilians, and their families. Clearance: Active DoD Secret clearance, US Citizenship is required. Location/Flexibility: Vienna, VA with remote flexibility.
